sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'
import { Fragment } from 'react'
import { Route, Routes } from 'react-router-dom'

const App = () => {
  return (
    <Fragment>
      <Routes>
        <Route path={`/*`}/>
        <Route />
      </Routes>
    </Fragment>
  )
}

export default App
